chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 2054 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objections No.1 & 2. 2. For hearing of CMA No.10070/2025. 3. For hearing of main case. 23.10.2025 Mr. Wasif Khan, advocate holding brief for Mr. Rana Azam ul Hassan, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Saqib Soomro, advocate for the respondents No.3 & 4. Counsel for the respondents’ states that the order issued by the FTO had been challenged before this court and the same is prima facie not amenable to adjudication in writ jurisdiction, as remedy is available under the relevant law. Learned counsel further placed on record document dated 23.06.2025 demonstrating that the petitioner has in fact filed representation against the impugned order before the President, as is required under the law. He states that even though the petition was not maintainable in view of arguments as stated supra, petition can also not be sustained once parallel recourse has already been adopted by the petitioner. Upon being so confronted, counsel is merely holding brief for counsel for the petitioner, who is not available. Accordingly, petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
